info.name: Library Management System
info.description:
# Library Management System API

A RESTful backend API for managing a library — built with **Node.js**, **Express**, and **MongoDB**. It supports user authentication, role-based access control, book catalog management, and member borrowing history.

---

## Base URL

```
http://localhost:5000
```

> All endpoints are prefixed with `/api`.

---

## Authentication Flow

This API uses **JWT (JSON Web Token)** based authentication.

1. Call `POST /api/auth/login` with valid credentials.
2. Receive a signed JWT token in the response.
3. Include the token in the `Authorization` header for all protected requests:

```
Authorization: Bearer <your_token_here>
```

> Tokens expire after **24 hours**. Re-authenticate to obtain a new token.

---

## Role-Based Access

| Role | Description |
|---|---|
| **Public** | No authentication required |
| **Member** | Authenticated user with `role: member` |
| **Librarian** | Authenticated user with `role: librarian` — has elevated privileges |

### Access Summary by Endpoint

| Endpoint | Method | Access |
|---|---|---|
| `/api/auth/login` | POST | Public |
| `/api/auth/register` | POST | Librarian only |
| `/api/books` | GET | Member, Librarian |
| `/api/members/` | GET | Librarian only |
| `/api/members/me/books` | GET | Member, Librarian |

---

## Endpoints

### 1. Login
**`POST /api/auth/login`**

Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "email": "librarian@test.com",
  "password": "yourlibrarypassword"
}
```

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "token": "<jwt_token>",
  "user": {
    "_id": "...",
    "name": "Eshwar",
    "email": "librarian@test.com",
    "role": "librarian"
  }
}
```

---

### 2. Register User
**`POST /api/auth/register`**

Creates a new user account. Restricted to librarians.

**Required Headers:**
```
Authorization: Bearer <librarian_token>
```

**Request Body:**
```json
{
  "name": "Rohith Kumar",
  "email": "rohith@test.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "role": "member"
}
```

**Success Response (201):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "user": {
    "_id": "...",
    "name": "Rohith Kumar",
    "email": "rohith@test.com",
    "role": "member"
  }
}
```

---

### 3. Get All Books
**`GET /api/books`**

Returns the full library book catalog.

**Required Headers:**
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 3,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "title": "The Pragmatic Programmer",
      "author": "David Thomas",
      "isbn": "978-0201616224",
      "category": "Programming",
      "quantity": 5
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### 4. Get All Members
**`GET /api/members/`**

Returns a list of all registered members. Restricted to librarians.

**Required Headers:**
```
Authorization: Bearer <librarian_token>
```

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 2,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "name": "Rohith Kumar",
      "email": "rohith@test.com",
      "role": "member",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-28T10:56:20.489Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### 5. Get My Borrowed Books
**`GET /api/members/me/books`**

Returns the list of books currently borrowed by the authenticated user.

**Required Headers:**
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 1,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "title": "Clean Code",
      "author": "Robert C. Martin",
      "borrowedAt": "2026-06-28T09:00:00.000Z",
      "dueDate": "2026-07-05T09:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

> Returns an empty array if the user has no active borrowings.

---

## Error Responses

| Status Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `400` | Bad Request — missing or invalid fields |
| `401` | Unauthorized — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — insufficient role permissions |
| `404` | Not Found — resource does not exist |
| `500` | Internal Server Error |

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Runtime | Node.js |
| Framework | Express.js |
| Database | MongoDB (Mongoose ODM) |
| Auth | JWT (jsonwebtoken) |
| Password Hashing | bcrypt |

request.description:
Registers a new user account in the Library Management System. This endpoint is restricted to librarians only — the request must include a valid JWT Bearer token in the `Authorization` header belonging to a user with the `librarian` role.

**Request Body (JSON):**
- `name` *(string, required)* — Full name of the new user.
- `email` *(string, required)* — Email address for the new account.
- `password` *(string, required)* — Password for the new account.
- `role` *(string, optional)* — Role to assign to the new user (e.g., `librarian` or `member`).

**Authorization:** Bearer token required (`librarian` role).

**Response:** Returns an error if the token is missing or if the authenticated user does not have the `librarian` role.

Retrieves a list of all registered members in the system. Only accessible by users with the `librarian` role.

**Method & URL:** `GET /api/members/`

**Access:** Librarian only.

**Required Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer <token>` — A valid JWT token belonging to a `librarian` user.

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 2,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "name": "Rohith Kumar",
      "email": "rohith@test.com",
      "role": "member",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-28T10:56:20.489Z"
    },
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "name": "Eshwar",
      "email": "librarian@test.com",
      "role": "member",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-28T11:01:38.547Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

Retrieves the full catalog of books available in the library. Accessible by all authenticated users (both members and librarians).

**Method & URL:** `GET /api/books`

**Access:** Member, Librarian.

**Required Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer <token>` — A valid JWT token for any authenticated user.

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 3,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "title": "The Pragmatic Programmer",
      "author": "David Thomas",
      "isbn": "978-0201616224",
      "category": "Programming",
      "quantity": 5
    }
  ]
}
```

Retrieves the list of books currently borrowed by the authenticated member. Each member can only view their own borrowed books.

**Method & URL:** `GET /api/members/me/books`

**Access:** Member, Librarian (scoped to the token owner).

**Required Headers:**
- `Authorization: Bearer <token>` — A valid JWT token for the authenticated user.

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "count": 1,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "title": "Clean Code",
      "author": "Robert C. Martin",
      "borrowedAt": "2026-06-28T09:00:00.000Z",
      "dueDate": "2026-07-05T09:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Notes:**
- Returns an empty array if the user has no currently borrowed books.
- The endpoint is self-scoped — it always returns books for the user identified by the token, not a specific member ID.

Authenticates an existing user and returns a signed JWT token to be used for all protected routes.

**Method & URL:** `POST /api/auth/login`

**Access:** Public — no authentication required.

**Request Body (JSON):**
- `email` *(string, required)* — The registered email address of the user.
- `password` *(string, required)* — The user's password.

**Success Response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "token": "<jwt_token>",
  "user": {
    "_id": "...",
    "name": "Eshwar",
    "email": "librarian@test.com",
    "role": "librarian"
  }
}
```

**Notes:**
- Copy the returned `token` value and use it as `Bearer <token>` in the `Authorization` header for all protected requests.
- Tokens expire after 24 hours.
